prose:
**Fukui Reactivity of Ferrocene** — GFN2-xTB (xtb program), gas phase, neutral (charge 0, multiplicity 1). Fukui descriptors computed from neutral and charged species (cation N+1, anion N−1). Partial charges via Mulliken scheme. The iron atom (atom 11) is the most electrophilic (f⁺ = 0.22885456) and most nucleophilic (f⁻ = 0.25938191) site, with a negative dual descriptor indicating net nucleophilicity. The ligand carbon and hydrogen atoms show much lower Fukui indices (~0.014 and ~0.063 respectively), indicating metal-centered reactivity. SCF converged for all three states (N, N+1, N−1). Charge conservation check passed: sum(f⁺) and sum(f⁻) both equal 1.000. No warnings reported. Integrity status: trustworthy.</prose>
<parameter name="value">0.25938191
